title: oldenlandia hirsuta var. glabrior
intro: Oldenlandia hirsuta var. glabrior, also known as hairy hairy hairless oldenlandia, is a variety of the Oldenlandia hirsuta plant, which is a type of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae. This plant is used in traditional medicine in various parts of Asia and is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. The health benefits associated with Oldenlandia hirsuta var. glabrior include reducing fever, treating respiratory infections, and alleviating symptoms of bronchitis and asthma. In herbal preparations, the leaves and stems of the plant are typically dried and made into infusions, decoctions, or extracts, which can be consumed as teas, capsules, or tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
